bids.contractor: Constructora Clínica del Pacífico S.A. de C.V.
bids.notes: Contractor has completed 4 COFEPRIS-regulated healthcare facilities in BCS and Sonora. References provided. Medical gas subcontractor has COFEPRIS certification. Clinical HVAC subcontractor specializes in healthcare.

bids.contractor: Grupo Constructor Horizonte S.A. de C.V.
bids.notes: Contractor has completed 6 healthcare projects in Baja California peninsula. Strong COFEPRIS compliance track record — no major corrections on previous projects. Medical gas in-house certified team.

bids.contractor: Constructora Médica Sur S.A. de C.V.
bids.notes: Newest of the three bidders; 3 healthcare facilities completed in Sinaloa. COFEPRIS experience present but less extensive than the other two contractors. Higher overall bid.

recommendation: Constructora Clínica del Pacífico S.A. de C.V.
recommendation_rationale: Three bids received, all from contractors with verified COFEPRIS clinical construction experience as required by the commercial_health_center SOW template. Constructora Clínica del Pacífico offers the lowest total at USD 1,840,000 with the shortest timeline (78 weeks), and has 4 prior COFEPRIS-regulated healthcare projects in BCS and Sonora — the most locally relevant experience. Their medical gas subcontractor holds COFEPRIS certification. All three bids fall within 4.3% of each other, confirming market pricing is consistent. Recommend awarding to Constructora Clínica del Pacífico.
